title: Full Overview Navigation Redesign and Planning Snapshot Report Builder Cleanup
old_ui_issue_summary: The previous Overview front door started with six focus buttons that behaved like another set of layer categories.
The full focus chooser appeared above the map while the right panel repeated focus/layer information.
The left map layers rail defaulted to a large expanded control panel, making the first screen feel like a GIS admin console.
Users had too many equal-weight choices before understanding the primary workflow: search, explore, save snapshot, open methodology.

command_center_redesign.new_subtitle: Search, explore, and capture report-ready context.

primary_workflows.title: Find a Parcel
primary_workflows.purpose: Search or select a parcel and focus the live map.

primary_workflows.title: Explore Countywide Intelligence
primary_workflows.purpose: Scan growth, flood, parcel coverage, and active overlays.

primary_workflows.title: Build Planning Snapshot
primary_workflows.purpose: Capture map context, layers, caveats, and explanations.

notes: The command cards are workflow actions, not map-layer categories.
The Save Snapshot action dispatches to the existing snapshot builder so map capture and caveat behavior stay centralized.
Existing layer toggles and live overlay controls remain available.
The layer rail is secondary by default so the map and Command Center become the dominant first-screen workflow.

no_parcel_state.title: Intelligence Brief
no_parcel_state.helper: Search a parcel to add parcel-specific facts.

removed_from_right_panel: extra selected-parcel card below the brief

snapshot_report_map_screenshot_implement.caption_verified: Map snapshot captured from CFS Overview at [timestamp].
snapshot_report_map_screenshot_implement.fallback_behavior: If capture fails or times out, Planning Snapshot shows a clean Map snapshot unavailable placeholder and keeps the report usable.

wording_cleanup: Replaced user-facing Review Focus/focus mode language with Snapshot Context and Overview Command Center.
Updated Planning Snapshot empty state to start from Overview, search/map context, save snapshot, explain numbers, print summary.
Kept major metric cards with value, meaning, source, method, caveat, and recommended action.

model_wording_safety_verification.overview_model_status_wording: Current best internal model research remains aggregate-only. No parcel probability or ranking class is shown in Overview.
model_wording_safety_verification.source_code_note: Internal aggregate hooks still contain backend field names and documented ranking buckets, but browser smoke confirmed they are not displayed as parcel-level outputs in Overview, Planning Snapshot, or Methodology.

documentation_updates: README Overview/Planning Snapshot descriptions updated for Command Center workflow.
Demo walkthrough updated to remove review-focus instructions.
Final demo checklist updated to verify CFS Command Center.
Two-minute demo script updated for Command Center language.
Higher-up speaking notes updated for Command Center and saved command context.

smoke_test_results.map_visually_dominant: verified by collapsed default layer rail and command strip above SceneView
smoke_test_results.map_screenshot_or_placeholder: captured screenshot appeared in report during smoke

remaining_known_issues: The layer rail remains expandable/resizable by design; if a user opens it, the map will share space with advanced controls.
A legacy unused Overview selected-parcel helper remains temporarily in IntelligencePanel with a scoped lint suppression for rollback safety during this dirty phase history.
Map screenshot capture depends on ArcGIS SceneView readiness and browser/GPU state; report fallback remains necessary.
recommended_next_step: Run one visual demo pass at the target presentation screen size and decide whether to remove the retained legacy Overview selected-parcel helper after the new Command Center is accepted.
